## Preface {.unnumbered}

This document contains the online appendices for the paper. Each appendix is a self-contained analysis with reproducible code. Click "Show Code" to expand any code block.

| Appendix | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| A | Simulation Code and Parameters |
| B | Robustness Check of the Simulation |
| C | Replication of Study 1 with Experienced Decision-Makers |
| D | Analysis of Participants' Choices in Study 1 (Diagnostic Cue Replication) |
| E | Analysis of Participants' Choices in Study 2 |
| F | Full Results for Study 3b |
| G | Full Results for Study 3c |
| H | Analysis of Testing Strategies in Study 4 |
